title: US Foods: Same Story, Different Year

title: Best Dividend Kings For January 2022
text: The 35 Dividend Kings finished 2021 on a bright note adding 8.79% in December. The 8 best dividend kings based on forecasted growth and valuation trailed the average dividend king return by 161 bps in December.

title: Sysco to Webcast Presentation at the ICR Conference 2022
text: HOUSTON, Jan. 04, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) today announced that the Company will webcast its presentation at the ICR Conference 2022 on Monday, January 10, at 1:00 p.m. ET.
